text: Being here, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The glass walls and open space of the first location invite transparency yet keep distance—a physical metaphor for the ways in which we present ourselves and our thoughts. Moving to the vibrant R+D exhibit, I am energized by the spirit of invention and inquiry. Ideas are bursting from the walls, urging reflection on human progress and the quiet, profound questions that linger behind every act of creation. I feel a spark—an inclination to ponder, to listen, and to search for meaning amid innovation.
